notes: Tags: outcome-detachment, shipping-discipline, team-state. The 'outcome-detachment' tag is shared with 2.47 — and the doctrinal coherence is exact: 2.38 seeds the equanimity disposition that 2.47 turns into the right-to-action / not-to-fruits formulation. The 'shipping-discipline' tag is consistent with the chapter's karma-yoga block. The 'team-state' tag is non-redundant — it captures that the dispositional posture being described is achievable as a team state, not just an individual stance. Cross-references to 2.47 (mature statement) and 2.48 (imperative) and 2.55-2.72 (achieved sthita-prajña state) are doctrinally accurate. The engineering layer does not contradict 2.47's right-to-action claim or 2.48's yoga-sthaḥ imperative; it positions 2.38 as the seed they elaborate. Three-pair structure (felt experience / launch outcome / competitive position) is non-overlapping with neighboring verses' anchors.
